summary: Add long-form --help text clarifying that videos viewed sources from the webhook event stream.
reason: Empty results from videos viewed against a workspace with real views (622 total) was confusing. The rollup is keyed off video.viewed/video.milestone webhook events, not the API counter — empty results don't mean zero views, they mean no view events have hit the inbox yet.
validated_outcome: videos viewed --help now explains the data source and points users to wire a webhook endpoint.
